child_profiles.bio: Anna loves listening to Bible stories with her grandmother and enjoys reading picture books about Jesus.
David is in second grade and his favorite time of day is when his teacher reads Bible stories to the class.
Mia has just started learning to read and loves picture Bibles and singing simple Scripture songs.
Jonah enjoys reading Bible comics and helping younger children in his village learn memory verses.
Sara loves to act out Bible stories with her friends and dreams of becoming a teacher one day.
Emmanuel enjoys drawing pictures from Bible stories and proudly shows them to his pastor.
Lucy loves to sing and dance during children's church and is just beginning to learn Bible verses.
Pedro helps lead songs in his children's ministry and enjoys playing soccer with friends.
Grace's favorite story is the Good Samaritan, and she loves to retell it to her younger siblings.
Jacob enjoys reading his children's Bible and drawing scenes of Jesus' parables.
Naomi loves Bible story time at the after-school program and is learning to read simple Bible verses.
Isaac is shy but lights up when someone reads him Bible stories about Jesus and His friends.
Elijah enjoys reading storybooks about heroes of faith and practicing memory verses with his friends.

craft_activities.title: Easter Cross Tissue Paper Suncatcher
craft_activities.summary: Kids create a colorful cross-shaped suncatcher to remember Jesus' resurrection.

craft_activities.title: Mini "Empty Tomb" Easter Garden
craft_activities.summary: Build a small Easter garden with an empty tomb to visualize the resurrection story.

craft_activities.title: "He Is Risen" Pop-Up Easter Card
craft_activities.summary: Children make a simple pop-up card to share the Easter message with family and friends.

craft_activities.title: Resurrection Rolls Object Lesson
craft_activities.summary: Bake sweet rolls that illustrate the empty tomb on Easter morning.

craft_activities.title: Family Prayer Jar Craft
craft_activities.summary: Create a prayer jar filled with prompts to help families pray together.

craft_activities.title: Nativity Story Stick Puppets
craft_activities.summary: Kids make simple stick puppets to retell the Christmas story.

craft_activities.title: Thanksgiving Blessing Chain
craft_activities.summary: Create a paper chain of written blessings to decorate the home or classroom.

craft_activities.title: Pentecost Flame Headbands
craft_activities.summary: Children make flame headbands to remember the coming of the Holy Spirit.

craft_activities.title: Fruit of the Spirit Tree Poster
craft_activities.summary: Create a large poster tree and add fruit pieces as kids grow in each fruit of the Spirit.

craft_activities.title: Bible Story Dice Cube
craft_activities.summary: Kids assemble a dice cube with story prompts to help them retell Bible stories at home.

donation_funds.name: Children's Bible Story Kits
donation_funds.description: Provides illustrated Bibles, story cards, and activity guides for children to explore God's Word at home and in church.

donation_funds.name: Summer Bible Camp Scholarships
donation_funds.description: Helps children from low-income families attend summer Bible camp and hear about Jesus.

donation_funds.name: General Children's Ministry Fund
donation_funds.description: Supports ongoing children's ministry programs, volunteer training, and resource development.

donation_funds.name: International Outreach Projects
donation_funds.description: Funds special projects bringing Bible-based hope to children around the world.

lesson_plans.title: Parable of the Lost Sheep (Ages 5–7)
lesson_plans.summary: Children learn how God lovingly seeks each one of us, like a shepherd searching for a lost sheep.

lesson_plans.title: Parable of the Good Samaritan (Ages 5–7)
lesson_plans.summary: Kids explore what it means to love their neighbor through the story of the Good Samaritan.

lesson_plans.title: Parable of the Sower (Ages 5–7)
lesson_plans.summary: Through hands-on activities, children discover how God's Word can grow in their hearts.

lesson_plans.title: Wise and Foolish Builders (Ages 5–7)
lesson_plans.summary: Kids build and test mini houses to learn what it means to build their lives on Jesus.

lesson_plans.title: Parable of the Lost Coin (Ages 8–10)
lesson_plans.summary: Older kids dig into the joy of heaven when one person repents, through interactive games and discussion.

lesson_plans.title: Parable of the Prodigal Son (Ages 8–11)
lesson_plans.summary: Students explore God's forgiveness and grace through role-play and reflection activities.

lesson_plans.title: He Is Risen: The Empty Tomb (Ages 5–7)
lesson_plans.summary: Children celebrate the resurrection of Jesus with simple storytelling and joyful songs.

lesson_plans.title: Jesus Is Born (Ages 5–7)
lesson_plans.summary: A Christmas lesson helping children understand the good news of Jesus' birth.

lesson_plans.title: God Made the World (Creation)
lesson_plans.summary: Kids discover God's power and creativity in the story of creation.

lesson_plans.title: Noah and the Ark: God Keeps His Promises
lesson_plans.summary: Children learn about God's faithfulness and promises through Noah's story.

lesson_plans.title: Fruit of the Spirit for Little Ones (Ages 3–5)
lesson_plans.summary: Preschoolers discover the fruit of the Spirit with simple actions and songs.

lesson_plans.title: Living the Fruit of the Spirit (Ages 9–11)
lesson_plans.summary: Older kids dive deeper into each fruit of the Spirit and apply it to everyday situations.

lesson_plans.title: Family Prayer Time Basics
lesson_plans.summary: A guide for leaders to help parents start simple family devotions and prayer times at home.

product_categories.name: Curriculum Sets
product_categories.description: Multi-week children's ministry curriculum sets organized by age group and theme.

product_categories.name: Devotional Books
product_categories.description: Print and digital devotionals designed for children and families.

product_categories.name: Activity Packs
product_categories.description: Printable activity packs including games, puzzles, and take-home sheets.

product_categories.name: Digital Downloads
product_categories.description: Instant-download resources such as slides, printables, and media files.

events.title: Summer Bible Camp Week 1 – "Shine for Jesus"
events.description: A five-morning Bible camp with worship, small groups, games, and Bible stories for ages 7–10.

events.title: Summer Bible Camp Week 2 – "Faith Builders"
events.description: Hands-on Bible lessons and creative activities for kids, with a focus on building strong faith foundations.

events.title: Northside Summer Bible Camp – Adventure with Jesus
events.description: A full-week Bible camp with outdoor games, crafts, and interactive Bible teaching for upper elementary kids.

events.title: Westside Kids Bible Camp – Heroes of Faith
events.description: June Bible camp exploring heroes of faith from Hebrews 11 through games and drama.

events.title: Grace Oak Family Easter Celebration
events.description: An interactive family Easter experience with worship, crafts, and a retelling of the resurrection story.

events.title: Helping Your Kids Love God's Word
events.description: A two-hour workshop for parents on leading simple family devotions and prayer times.

events.title: Children's Ministry Volunteer Orientation
events.description: Required orientation for new volunteers serving in children's classes and events.

events.title: Midtown Family Worship & Games Night
events.description: An evening of worship, Bible games, and snacks for the whole family.

events.title: Back-to-School Bible Bash
events.description: Celebrate the new school year with worship, games, and a challenge to live for Jesus at school.

events.title: Teaching Kids the Fruit of the Spirit at Home
events.description: Live online webinar for parents on modeling and teaching the fruit of the Spirit.

events.title: Children's Christmas Program Rehearsal
events.description: Rehearsal for children participating in the Christmas program.

events.title: Spring Break Bible Day Camp
events.description: A three-day daytime camp focusing on Jesus' parables and object lessons.

products.name: Fruit of the Spirit Curriculum – Preschool Core (Ages 3–5)
products.description: A four-week preschool curriculum introducing each fruit of the Spirit with simple stories, songs, and activities.

products.name: Fruit of the Spirit Curriculum – Games & Activities Pack (Ages 3–5)
products.description: Supplemental games, craft ideas, and take-home pages to reinforce the Fruit of the Spirit for preschoolers.

products.name: Fruit of the Spirit Curriculum – Elementary (Ages 6–8)
products.description: Six-session curriculum helping younger elementary kids discover how the Holy Spirit grows fruit in their lives.

products.name: Fruit of the Spirit Curriculum – Core Lessons (Ages 9–11)
products.description: A four-week preteen curriculum exploring each fruit of the Spirit through Bible study, discussion, and application.

products.name: Fruit of the Spirit Small Group Guide (Ages 9–11)
products.description: Small group leader guide with discussion questions and object lessons on the Fruit of the Spirit for preteens.

products.name: Jesus' Parables Curriculum – Ages 5–7
products.description: Four-week curriculum exploring Jesus' parables with simple stories, activities, and memory verses.

products.name: Family Devotions for Kids Ages 8–10
products.description: A 60-day devotional book to help families with children ages 8–10 grow in faith together.

products.name: Helping Kids Pray: A Parent's Guide
products.description: Practical ideas and sample prayers to help children learn to talk with God.

products.name: Easter Activity Pack (Ages 6–8)
products.description: Printable games, puzzles, and coloring pages that help kids ages 6–8 understand the Easter story.

products.name: Parables Crafts & Games Pack (Ages 5–7)
products.description: Crafts and games that complement parable-themed lessons for young children.

products.name: Fruit of the Spirit Slide Pack
products.description: Editable presentation slides for teaching the Fruit of the Spirit in large-group settings.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Midtown Sunday Children's Class Helper – 9:00am
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Serve in the elementary classroom at the 9:00am Sunday service helping kids engage with Bible lessons and activities.
volunteer_opportunities.location_description: Midtown Atlanta Children's Ministry Center – Elementary Room 2

volunteer_opportunities.title: Midtown Sunday Children's Class Helper – 11:00am
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Assist the lead teacher with check-in, small group discussion, and crafts during the 11:00am service.
volunteer_opportunities.location_description: Midtown Atlanta Children's Ministry Center – Elementary Room 3

volunteer_opportunities.title: Northside Large Group Host – Sunday Mornings
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Welcome kids, lead games, and help with large-group worship for Sunday morning services.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Westside Preschool Helper – Sunday 10:30am
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Care for preschoolers, assist with simple crafts, and help them feel safe and loved.
volunteer_opportunities.location_description: Westside Kids Community Center – Preschool Room

volunteer_opportunities.title: Grace Oak Kids Check-In Team
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Help parents check in their children, print labels, and direct families to classrooms.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Online Kids Bible Storytime Host
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Host a weekly online video call where you read Bible stories and lead simple discussions with kids.
volunteer_opportunities.location_description: Serve from home using a stable internet connection and webcam.

volunteer_opportunities.title: Midtown Weekday Resource Prep Team
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Cut, copy, and prepare craft materials for Sunday children's classes.
volunteer_opportunities.location_description: Midtown Atlanta Children's Ministry Center – Workroom

volunteer_opportunities.title: Parent Newsletter Content Writer
volunteer_opportunities.summary: Help write short devotion ideas and prayer prompts for the weekly parent newsletter.
volunteer_opportunities.location_description: Remote role – collaborate with staff via email and video calls.

registration_children.special_needs_notes: Mild peanut allergy  snacks must be nut-free.
Sensory-sensitive  prefers quieter activities when possible.

event_registrations.notes: Prefers to finalize payment at Monday morning check-in.
Requested mailed invoice; will submit medical forms at orientation.
Approved for early drop-off at 8:30am each day.
